productDisplayName: Enroute Women Casual  Coral Red Casual Shoes
description: Revel in the comfort of leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of ballet flats from enroute. Pair it with ethno-western clothes for a fab-yet-comfy look. This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.UpperLeather upper with a leather bow that has metallic embellishments on the toe region for absolute durability, comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of wearLeather footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole grooved on the forefoot with a textured PU heel patch for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
